rulings.Case Title: FAIR MARKET PROPERTIES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. EAST WEST BANK, A CALIFORNAI CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 1. Plaintiff Fair Market Properties, LLC's Order to Show Cause re Peliminary Injunction. Deny preliminary injunction. 1) See Calvo v. HSBC cited in papers. 2) No showing of possibility of prevailing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JSP BROADWAY, LLC VS. BENJAMIN ALFARO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 2. Defendant Benjamin Alfaro's motion to be declared prevailing party and for reasonable attorney's fees. Grant. 1) Moving party prevailing party; 2) Attorney fees in the amount of $900 per stipulation awarded. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDUARDO L. NAGUIT VS. TIEA L. DUBLIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Forfeiture
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 5. Defendant Tiea Dublin's Motion for Relief from Forfeiture. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDUARDO L. NAGUIT VS. TIEA L. DUBLIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 5. Defendant Tiea Dublin's Motion to Set Aside/Vacate Judgment. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETRADE BANK VS. BLANCA MIRIAN HERRERA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgemnt On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 6. Plaintiff E-Trade Bank's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Off calendar, untimely and failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. JOSE MONTOYA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories Andf For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 3. Defendant Jose Montoya's Motion to Compel Answers to Interrogatories and for Sandtions. Grant Motion to Compel, subject to opposition. Sanctions in the amount of $170 awarded. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. JOSE MONTOYA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 3. Defendant Jose Montoya's Motion for Summary Judgment. Deny Motion for Summary Judgment. Moving party failed to shift burden as to amount due. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GLENN CHOW VS. XIU Y ZHENG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 4. Defendants XiuZheng and Juile To's Demurrer to Complaint. Sustained without leave to amend. The notice is fatally defective fails to provide, "...Hours and days to receive payment..." CCP 1161(2). = (501/REQ)
